strengths: Hands-on experience with high-throughput distributed microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/second, low-latency async I/O), demonstrating real production scalability instincts
Exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, including contribution to frameworks supporting agentic workflows
Broad full-stack and polyglot background spanning embedded systems, event-driven platforms, and cloud-native tooling, indicating strong technical adaptability
concerns: No executive or people-leadership track record — titles remain Staff/Senior Software Developer throughout; no evidence of managing, scaling, or developing engineering teams of any size

Fintech experience is shallow and tangential — the RIDE Capital role involved investment software but shows no depth in credit systems, working-capital management, payment flows, or regulatory compliance infrastructure
AI/agentic experience is limited to a 6-month staff-engineer stint with vague scope; no demonstrated production multi-agent systems built and operated at scale in high-stakes environments
response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled and versatile senior engineer with genuine strengths in distributed systems and an emerging interest in agentic AI tooling, but the resume presents no evidence of the executive leadership, team-scaling, board-level communication, or production multi-agent AI depth that define this CTO role. The fintech exposure is incidental rather than infrastructural, and the most relevant AI work spans only six months at an individual-contributor level. The gap between the candidate's current level and the role's requirements is substantial across every hard requirement listed.
